heading: Appointment and compensation of employees by President pro tempore of Senate
label: 6113 Appointment and compensation of employees by President pro tempore of Senate
text: Effective , the President pro tempore is authorized to appoint and fix the compensation of such employees as he deems appropriate: , That the gross compensation paid to such employees shall not exceed $123,000 each fiscal year.October 1, 1979Provided
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 61k of this titleSection is from the Supplemental Appropriations Act, 1979.

Increases in CompensationIncreases in compensation for Senate officers and employees under authority of Federal Pay Comparability Act of 1970 (), see Salary Directives of President pro tempore of the Senate, set out as notes under .Pub. L. 91–656section 4571 of this title
